payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Glossy dark red-brown carved wooden chair with ornate openwork backrest and vertical slats; seat area is partly visible with deep shadow and the top/sides are edge-cropped (partial) in the image — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark red carved wooden chair (cropped)","long_description":"Glossy dark red-brown carved wooden chair with ornate openwork backrest and vertical slats; seat area is partly visible with deep shadow and the top/sides are edge-cropped (partial) in the image — approximately 0.6 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark red-brown","lacquered glossy finish","carved openwork backrest","vertical slats","wooden material","seat partly visible","edge-cropped","deep shadow in seat"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
